data.raceComments: {"comment":"14. WEN MOON makes some attraction towards bottom of the weights. Secured a 1L victory providing final start this season contesting a Musselburgh handicap. Holds winning form at this course. Can double up. 10. KATS BOB is starting to race consistently with three placed efforts past five attempts including losing out by 0.75L placing second tackling a handicap at Catterick eight days ago. May go one better. 4. ROBERTO CARO left behind four disappointing efforts when third in a Newcastle AW handicap last time. Expected to challenge. 1. SIXTYGEESBABY delivers initial attempt this season. Might improve on a latest eighth at Doncaster .","runners":[14,10,4,1],"exclusive":false}
